items.title: Expert team continues inspection of Polavaram project for second day
items.summary: It focuses on the borrow earth being used for the Earth-cum-Rock Fill dam works, examines soil storage areas and quality tests being conducted before its usage

items.title: Sinner shocked in French Open exit as Cerundolo recovers from two-sets down
items.summary: World number one Jannick Sinner beaten by 56th-ranked Argentinian opponent Juan Manuel Cerundolo at Roland Garros.

items.title: Newsom signs law to shield California elections from federal interference
